title: Studio Manager (amber)
description:
amber, the exciting new sister brand of Amore Fitness, is an upcoming boutique women’s-only group functional training studio in Singapore. The studio is built around high-quality coaching, strong community, and long-term member development. Join us as we take a step towards a new era of fitness in Singapore. 

We are looking for a dynamic Studio Manager to be the driving force behind studio operations, team leadership, sales performance and studio growth.

Key Responsibilities: 

Own Studio Operations 

  • Oversee daily operations of the studio, ensuring smooth and efficient performance. 
  • Manage staff rostering 
  • Maintain high standards of customer service, safety and cleanliness. 
  • Manage inventory of studio supplies, retail merchandise, and administrative materials. 
  • Conduct regular checks on equipment, and coordinate maintenance and repairs promptly. 

Sales & Revenue Growth 

  • Take ownership of monthly sales targets for new memberships, class packs, and retail products. 
  • Manage the sales funnel by responding to inquiries, conducting studio tours for prospective members, and following up on leads via phone/email. 
  • Monitor member attendance and implement re-engagement strategies for inactive members to minimize churn. 
  • Assist in tracking KPIs and preparing weekly sales reports for management.

Class Scheduling & Instructor Liaison 

  • Oversee the daily and monthly class schedule, ensuring a balanced mix of class styles and teachers to maximize attendance. 
  • Act as the primary POC for coaches call-outs; quickly secure substitute teachers to ensure zero class cancellations. 
  • Verify instructor attendance and class counts to assist with accurate payroll processing. 

Member Services and Community Management 

  • Lead by example at the front desk.
  • Handle member feedback, complaints, or account issues. 
  • Foster a warm and inclusive atmosphere.
  • Deliver exceptional member experience 

Team Leadership 

  • Manage and lead a team that includes full-time, part-time and freelance. 
  • Lead weekly huddles and performance reviews. 
  • Ensure team professionalism, punctuality and alignment with brand culture 
  • Onboard and train new staff as the studio grows 

Additional Skills

  • Prior experience as a Head Coach, Lead Coach, or Senior Coach may be considered for a hybrid role (Studio Manager & Head Coach)

Qualifications:

  • 2-4 years in team leadership or studio management 
  • Experience in fitness, hospitality, retails or service-based management preferred 
  • Experience managing schedules, systems, and customer interactions
  • Previous leadership or supervisory experience is a strong advantage

Requirements and Skill Sets:

  • Excellent communication and people management skills 
  • Sales-driven mindset with a focus on relationships and retention 
  • Customer-focused, calm, and solutions-oriented
  • Comfortable using booking systems, CRM tools, and basic reporting
  • Strong organisational and time-management skills
  • Willingness to work flexible hours 
  • Passion for health and wellness 

What We Offer:

  • Competitive salary + benefits package 
  • Free gym memberships 
  • Career progression through studio expansions 
  • Access to professional development, education and certifications 
  • Opportunity to be part of a studio from its early growth phase

We offer a competitive salary and benefits package based on merit and professional advantages of a dynamic environment that supports your development and recognizes your achievements.

Interested candidates are welcome to submit a detailed resume. For more information, please visit us at: www.amorefitness.com.

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Women Through Every Stage of Life

Since 1985, Amore Fitness has been Singapore’s leading women-only fitness and wellness brand — dedicated to helping women embrace healthier, stronger, and more confident lives.

From students and young professionals to mothers and seniors, we create a supportive community where women can thrive through every chapter of life.

Amore Fitness – Full-service gyms & studios with a wide range of group classes, from dance-inspired workouts to strength training, designed exclusively for women.
am Pilates – Dedicated reformer Pilates studios that focus on posture, core strength, and mindful movement.
Amore Define – Boutique spas offering rejuvenating treatments that restore balance and wellness.

With over four decades of experience, we remain passionate about blending fitness, wellness, and lifestyle into one holistic journey. Our mission goes beyond workouts — we aim to build a strong community of women who uplift and inspire one another.

👉 Join us as we redefine women’s wellness in Singapore.
Reach out to us at hr@amorefitness.com if you are keen to find out about our current openings!
postedCompany.name: AMORE FITNESS PTE. LTD.
